title.es: Proyecto de contexto del dashboard financiero de empresa

description.en: Audit and operationalize an existing full-stack repository with AI support: validate generated understanding, define actionable rules in .agents/rules, and produce a memory-bank with product, stack, and current status.
description.es: Audita y operacionaliza un repositorio full-stack existente con apoyo de IA: valida la comprensión generada, define reglas accionables en .agents/rules y crea un memory-bank con producto, stack y estado actual.

sharing.en: I just completed the Company financial dashboard context project with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: repo analysis with AI, actionable rules, and a project memory-bank. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/company-financial-dashboard-context-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #Git #Documentation
sharing.es: Acabo de completar el Company financial dashboard context project con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: análisis de repo con IA, reglas accionables y memory-bank del proyecto. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/company-financial-dashboard-context-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #Git #Documentacion

sharing.en: Built and documented: Company financial dashboard context project. From sparse handover to clear engineering rules and memory-bank with @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/company-financial-dashboard-context-project #AIEngineering #RepositoryStewardship #4GeeksAcademy
sharing.es: Construido y documentado: Company financial dashboard context project. De un handover limitado a reglas de ingeniería claras y memory-bank con @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/company-financial-dashboard-context-project #AIEngineering #RepositoryStewardship #4GeeksAcademy
